summary: A color-graded montage set to music about VP Vance and the White House Fraud Task Force, with voiceover over a music bed. Footage includes a large American flag, veterans saluting, Trump and Vance saluting at an Arlington-style ceremony, and Vance moving through a diner crowd in slow motion. Animated gold ALL-CAPS captions appear ('...IS A BROKEN PROMISE TO A VETERAN.', 'MAKING AMERICA'). Voiceover lines include 'you don't get a pass, you get a reckoning.'

script.scene: Color-graded shot of uniformed veterans in caps saluting beneath a large waving American flag; gold animated caption '...IS A BROKEN PROMISE TO A VETERAN.' VO: 'Every dollar lost to fraud is a broken promise to a senior on a fixed income, a veteran waiting for care, or a family trying to catch a break.'
Backlit wide shot of Trump and VP Vance saluting on a flag-draped colonnade at dusk. VO: 'if you take something that isn't yours, you don't get a pass. You get a reckoning.'

Interior of a formal banquet/Cabinet-style table with seated officials, shallow depth of field. VO: 'Fraud, waste, and abuse are unacceptable... has exposed tens of billions of dollars of fraud against you.'
Handheld slow-motion shot of VP Vance moving through a crowded diner, greeting people. VO: 'The whole of government approach is working. And that's only the beginning.'

Gold animated title 'MAKING AMERICA' over a shot of Trump and Vance walking the White House colonnade. VO: 'The American dream is meant for builders, not scammers... Eliminating fraud, restoring trust, making America great again.'

notable_text: IS A BROKEN PROMISE TO A VETERAN
you don't get a pass. You get a reckoning
Eliminating fraud, restoring trust, making America great again
VP Vance and the @WHFraudTF are working around the clock to eliminate fraud and Make America great Again
